nodes.label: ProviaAI Brand Logo
nodes.description: Isolated ProviaAI logo on white background. Consists of a stylized geometric 'P' letterform in layered greens with a leaf/swoosh element integrated into the counter of the P, giving it an organic feel. To the right, the wordmark 'ProviaAI' in bold sans-serif with 'AI' italicised or visually differentiated. Logo has 3D shading/gloss effect on the icon mark.
design_decisions: 3D gloss effect on icon mark suggests premium, modern SaaS product
Leaf integrated into 'P' letterform: compact, memorable, dual-meaning (growth + initial)
Green gradient from dark forest green to bright lime: energy and innovation
White wordmark with subtle shadow for legibility on any background
Bold geometric sans-serif typeface for the wordmark — clean, confident, scalable
nodes.visual_language: tech-brand with nature/sustainability overtone, premium gloss finish

edges.rationale: Both logos belong to the same product ecosystem (ProviaAI powers the ProvKlar UF platform). They share green as a dominant brand color and a growth/progress visual language.
